text.cs: Pozdrav Pán Bůh. Hledáš teplé jídlo, nebo jen tak okukuješ?
text.en: God's greetings. Looking for a warm meal, or just passing through?
I'll be on my way. Farewell.

text.cs: Letos suché léto. Kovář pořád reptá, žezlo stárne. Ale chleba pečeme každý den.
text.en: Dry summer this year. The smith complains, the elder grows old. But we still bake bread every day.
